heading: Prohibition on use of Central Intelligence Agency services
label: 10234 Prohibition on use of Central Intelligence Agency services
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, no use will be made of services, facilities, or personnel of the Central Intelligence Agency.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3789k of Title 42
Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 809 and is classified to .section 815 of Pub. L. 90–351section 10228 of this title
